# Sunrise

## Tags
weather, time, morning, day

## Categories
arrows, weather, time

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/sunrise)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Sunrise;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Sunrise { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
